_meta.notes: 18-agent role matrix: minReasoning (absolute) + costRatio (relative to reference model). Coverage: 11 SDD + 3 JD + 4 Review.

gentle-orchestrator.role: Orchestration: planning, delegation, meta-reasoning across the 18-agent ecosystem

sdd-init.role: Initialize SDD context: scan openspec/, detect current agent, bootstrap scratchpad

sdd-explore.role: Read-only exploration: codebase + canonical material mapping; uses search + read tools

sdd-propose.role: Draft proposal.md: intent, scope, approach — needs high reasoning for architectural framing

sdd-spec.role: Write Given/When/Then specs: structured requirement authoring with RFC 2119 keywords

sdd-design.role: Architecture decisions: module boundaries, contracts, tradeoffs — high reasoning demand

sdd-tasks.role: Decompose change into reviewable task units with dependencies and acceptance criteria

sdd-apply.role: Implementation + tool calling: writes code, runs test/build/typecheck, may use large context

sdd-verify.role: Validate the change against specs and acceptance criteria; produces verification report

sdd-archive.role: Mechanically copy, format, and close change artifacts (cheapest role)

sdd-onboard.role: First-time onboarding for a developer adopting the SDD workflow

jd-judge-a.role: Blind twin judge (A): adversarial review against spec + code — uses large context

jd-judge-b.role: Blind twin judge (B): identical to A but independent — enforces twin judge constraint

jd-fix-agent.role: Apply fixes from judgement day findings; executes code changes based on twin judge consensus

review-risk.role: Read-only risk review: identifies regressions, security concerns, edge cases

review-readability.role: Read-only readability review: style, naming, structure, clarity of intent

review-reliability.role: Read-only reliability review: error handling, idempotency, retry safety

review-resilience.role: Read-only resilience review: failure modes, fallback strategies, graceful degradation
